slots.notes: Full-screen hero background. A very dark, almost black gradient or dark modern abstract pattern. No people, no screenshots. Native placeholder is a dark geometric abstract shapes or a dark forex background with overlay; replace with brand-specific visual asset. Fills the entire page - full-width, full-vheight.

The brand logo at the top-left of the hero. About 48px. It is an inline SVG icon or group-ic. Note: your brand logo gets the 'fg' text color - not a separate brand color. Native placeholder is a stylized circular shape or abstract logo mark.

The primary CTA button - it reads something like 'Explore Now' . It's a bordered button with text-accent color, transparent background, and a subtle border. This is running text - no data backend needed. A simple button with hover: opacity 0.9. Border-radius: 8px. Note: text-accent-color.

Three text fields: a

heading

,

body

, and a subtext/disclaimer. Each one is in its own card or section. The heading is the most prominent - something like 'The Digital Epoch is Now.' The body is a short paragraph. The subtext could be a date, a disclaimer, an expiration. These are running text - they are for you to fill in. No data backend. The heading is the most prominent - large, font-bold, tracking-tight. The body is smaller, more contrast. The subtext is the smallest. Note: bolder plate. Supply dummy text that reads well - brand will replace.

The secondary hero image. A decorative piece that provides visual appeal - a futuristic dashboard or an abstract representation of digital/blockchain. Object-cover, min-h[250px]. Native placeholder is a futuristic dashboard shot. Note: this is an additional image - the background of the hero is the main image.

mechanic: A full-page hero with dark background, subtile image, logo, headline, body, subtext, and CTA button. A left-text, right-image layout with full-width bg. Framer Motion useInView for entry.
techDelivery: React 18 + TypeScript. Tailwind CSS 3 as arbitrary values. Framer Motion v12 + for scroll-triggered animation. Icons from lucide-react.
reskinNotes: This is a blank slate for a digital/blockchain brand. Every text blend is hardcoded as dummy copy - Brand, Hero (CTA, Title, Subtitle, Body) - there is no CS/backend. The fonts and color scheme are not tokens or variables - you are responsible for changing them. The assets (background, logo, hero image) are for you to replace with your brand's. The color scheme is in - you can change. Note: browser-cards.json has the color scheme.
